description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. It features a prominent red handle and lever mechanism at the top, with a black hose attached near the handle and curving down the side of the cylinder. The front of the extinguisher displays a large white instruction label with red text, providing operational guidance. The base is flat with small feet for stability, and the surface shows some minor scuffs and wear, indicating use or age. The hose is secured to the body and ends with a metallic nozzle, while the top assembly includes a visible safety pin and a small metallic fitting.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, red handle, and a white instruction label on the front. The surface is metallic and slightly worn, with a visible safety pin and nozzle.
description_view_0: The front view shows the instruction label, red handle, black hose, and nozzle clearly.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the plain red back of the cylinder with the handle and safety pin visible at the top.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the curvature of the hose and the metallic nozzle, with the handle and top assembly in profile.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the hose running down the back, with the label faintly visible through the cylinder.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large white rectangular label with red text and instructions on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, curving down the side, ending in a metallic nozzle; the hose is secured to the body.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
